title: Form Templates
description: Manage the latest versions of equipment and calibration forms (UL-QP-18 · UL-QP-19). Per UL-QP-03 §8, superseded forms are replaced immediately, while historic numbers remain searchable for traceability.

search.placeholder: Search by past form number (e.g. UL-QP-18-01)
search.noResult: No form found for this number.
search.foundCurrent: This number refers to a currently active form.
search.foundHistoric: This form has been revised to {currentFormNumber}.

uploadDialog.title: Register Form
uploadDialog.descriptionInitial: Register {formName} for the first time. Enter the form number.
uploadDialog.descriptionRevise: Register a revision of {formName}. The new number must differ from {currentFormNumber}.
uploadDialog.descriptionReplace: Replace file for {formName} ({currentFormNumber}). The previous file will not be retained.
uploadDialog.modeHint: Use 'Revise' when the form number changes; use 'Replace' for simple corrections.
uploadDialog.newFormNumberHint: Enter the newly issued number from the procedure document
uploadDialog.changeSummaryPlaceholder: e.g. Added retention column, revised section 5.2 wording
uploadDialog.changeSummaryHint: Per UL-QP-03 §7.5, a revision reason of at least 5 characters is required

historyDialog.title: Revision History
historyDialog.downloadHistoryDenied: Only Quality Manager / Lab Manager / System Admin can download historical forms

emptyDescription: Form templates will appear here once they are configured.
errorDescription: Please check the network connection and try again.

archived.description: Forms automatically archived after their retention period (UL-QP-03 §11). Files are retained for legal and knowledge preservation purposes.
archived.emptyDescription: Forms whose retention period has elapsed will appear here automatically.
archived.downloadLocked: Only Quality Manager / Lab Manager / System Admin can download archived forms
